release_summary: Hard-exclude same-position same-team QB/RB/TE duplicates from the rec list entirely. v2.3.2 blocked chain credit but allowed candidates to surface via other signals (e.g., Woody Marks still at #2 via BPA/scarcity). v2.3.3 filters them out at the candidate stage — they no longer appear in the recs at all. WR-WR same-team continues to use the v2.3.2 chain-credit gate (candidate can still surface for 3rd same-team WR via BPA/CLV, just no chain bonus). Verified Marks disappears from top 15 at R13 P147 (Crispy has Monty HOU); Wan'Dale flip preserved (39.60 #3 over Doubs 36.52); Aaron Jones still #2; Hunter still buried; all v2.1.x triggers unaffected.
